title: alisma arcuatum var. lanceolatum
intro: Alisma arcuatum var. lanceolatum, also known as Alisma plantago-aquatica or water plantain, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Alismataceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, as well as its ability to lower blood sugar levels. The health benefits of Alisma arcuatum var. lanceolatum include its potential to treat conditions such as kidney stones, nephritis, and edema, as well as its use as a treatment for fever and rheumatism. Alisma arcuatum var. lanceolatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
